task: AI辅助项目立项评估方法论——硅谷VC框架与可执行方案

searcher_status.searcher-1: failed - context overflow, key queries to re-spawn: YC/a16z/Sequoia evaluation criteria, TAM/SAM/SOM methodology, deal memo template
searcher_status.searcher-3: completed - 12+ findings covering Lean Canvas, founder-market fit, investment criteria matrix, Sequoia template, CB Insights failure data, Indie Hackers validation

findings.content: Lean Canvas是Ash Maurya创建的一页式商业模式模板，9模块：Problem/Solution/UVP/Unfair Advantage/Customer Segments/Channels/Revenue/Cost/Key Metrics，适合零到一阶段
NFX的founder-market fit四维度：Obsession/Founder Story/Personality/Experience，VC在前10分钟内形成判断
早期投资评估权重：Team 40%、Market 25%、Product&Traction 25%、Business Model 10%
Founder-market fit自评5问（3个否=弱）：能说出10个客户名字？行业5年+经验？50+客户关系？有分发渠道？理解购买流程？
Investment Criteria Matrix量化评分：Founder(0-10)/Product(0-5)/Traction(0-5)/Business Model(0-5)/Market(0-5)，归一化为0-100分，映射投资额等级
Fifth Star Funds评估10维度：问题理解/市场规模/单元经济/方案验证/适应性/产品优先级/足智多谋/资金使用计划/毅力
Indie Hackers 48h验证手册：定义假设→挖掘痛点信号→评分排序→客户访谈→测试付费意愿→build/pivot二元决策
Sequoia商业模式模板10板块：Company Purpose/Problem/Solution/Why Now/Market Size/Competition/Product/Business Model/Team/Financials
CB Insights 2026年431家倒闭公司分析：70%资金耗尽（最终死因），43% PMF不足（根本原因），29%时机不对，19% unit economics不可持续
CB Insights历史失败原因：No market need 42%、Ran out of cash 29%、Wrong team 23%、Outcompeted 19%、Pricing/cost issues 18%

gaps: YC具体申请评分标准（需重新搜索）
a16z投资评估框架细节（需重新搜索）
TAM/SAM/SOM具体计算方法论（需重新搜索）
